subcodes.first_line: O thou who callest out in the name of the Covenant of the Daystar of the horizons! By the life of God, hearts accompany thee in thy journeys, and souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من نادی بمیثاق نیر الاشراق لعمر الله ان القلوب تصاحبک فی الاسفار و ان الارواح
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @prayer for protection, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
